environment_setup.filesystem_state: AWS CLI installed. Target S3 bucket requires an exact ARN format.

evaluation_loop.condition: Apply the new bucket policy to restrict public access.

injected_failure_state.observation: An error occurred (MalformedPolicy) when calling the PutBucketPolicy operation: Policy has invalid resource: my-secure-bucket

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent checks 'policy.json', identifies that the resource is missing the 'arn:aws:s3:::' prefix, fixes the JSON file, and retries.
